Records.authors: Parra-Martinez, Julio, Ruf, Michael S., Zeng, Mao
Records.description: Two-loop non-planar double-box (IX/XB) topology with two massive matter lines (m1 top, m2 bottom) connected by three gravitons in a non-planar (crossed-rungs) configuration. Scalar integral I_IX = I_{1,1,1,1,1,1,1,0,0} in the family of Eq. (4.99). After soft expansion the family has 15 master integrals (split even/odd in |q|), organized into a canonical pure basis f_{IX,1..15}. Canonical DE in dlog form with alphabet {x, x-1, x+1}; the differential equations and pure-basis structure parallel those of the planar RT family. The crossed xIX integral is identical to XI and obtained by crossing.
Records.location: Section 4.2.3, Eq. (4.99) (eq:XBPropsFull), Fig. 12 (props_XB). Pure basis: Eqs. (4.103)-(4.117). Crossed version xIX.
